ksa_text: Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the systems, methods, and tools used to collect, store, maintain, and govern each type throughout the data lifecycle.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of how to extract, analyze, and use metadata.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of how to extract, analyze, and use metadata.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Data Quality falls outside the primary competency scope of the AI Innovation Lead. This knowledge KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Data Quality truly out-of-scope for the AI Innovation Lead? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Data Quality as a core or recommended competency for the AI Innovation Lead. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Data Quality falls outside the established competency profile for the AI Innovation Lead. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Data Quality is outside the competency scope of the AI Innovation Lead. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
